## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Arch Linux, macOS]
- Browser: [e.g. Firefox 127, Chrome 126]
- Elysium Version: [e.g. 1.12.3]
- Deployment: [e.g. Docker, npm start]
